meta.goal: Fix the 3 reported issues with full FE/BE validation
definitionOfDone: Issue 1 onboarding flow is non-swipeable unless skip is used; create space has keyboard dismiss and prefill validation is correct
Issue 2 bulk delete confirmation uses MonekoAlertDialog
Issue 3 unified transaction sheet correctly reflects split status; no invalid update on no-change save

issues.title: Onboarding swipe + Create Space keyboard dismiss + prefill validation bug

symptoms: Users can swipe left/right in onboarding, bypassing required steps
Keyboard cannot be dismissed by tapping outside on Create Space
Prefilled space name fails validation on immediate continue
expected: Swipe disabled unless skip is used
Prefilled name is treated as valid input
actual: Keyboard remained visible until explicit action
Validation failed even with prefilled name

impact: Form feels broken with prefilled data

possibleCulprits.hypothesis: AdaptiveTextFormField validator relies on value parameter which may not reflect controller when prefilled

steps: Swipe between onboarding steps without pressing CTA
Tap Create Space input, open keyboard, tap outside
Launch Create Space from onboarding with prefilled name and tap Continue immediately

approach: Add tap-to-unfocus wrapper to Create Space body
Validate using controller text and enable autovalidation

changes: Disabled swipe navigation in onboarding PageView
Added tap outside to dismiss keyboard in Create Space
Updated name validator to use controller text and autovalidate

issues.title: Bulk delete confirmation should use MonekoAlertDialog

symptoms: Bulk delete uses default AlertDialog instead of MonekoAlertDialog

impact: Inconsistent UI/UX with the rest of the app

checks: Manual test of bulk delete flow

changes: Replaced bulk delete confirmation with MonekoAlertDialog

issues.title: Split banner shown incorrectly + invalid update on no-change save

dataSample: split_group_id present in saved expense but banner still shows

symptoms: Banner says 'not yet split' even when split_group_id exists
Clicking save without changes triggers 'invalid expense update'
expected: Banner hidden when split group exists
No-change save should be a no-op or valid update

possibleCulprits.hypothesis: Split group resolution not seeded when split_group_id exists
Update payload always sends date/created_at even when unchanged

steps: AI log a receipt split among household members
Observe banner and click save immediately

approach: Seed split group state when split_group_id exists
Skip sending date/created_at when not edited

checks: Open sheet for split expense; banner hidden
Click save without edits; no error

changes: Seeded resolved split group state from existing expense
Guarded update payload to avoid unchanged date/time updates
Skip split resolution when sharing toggle is off
